title: Global productivity slowdown
description: Economists discuss why total factor productivity has declined in many countries, focusing on both common factors affecting all economies and country-specific issues impacting emerging market和发展中国家的生产力普遍下滑，经济学家探讨了这一现象背后的原因，既包括影响所有经济体的共同因素，也包括特定国家面临的独特挑战。
